title: The Thought Beneath So Slight A Film
content:
The thought beneath so slight a film
    Is more distinctly seen, --
    As laces just reveal the surge,
    Or mists the Apennine.
meaning:
"The Thought Beneath So Slight A Film" is a quintessential example of Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
